title: ononis cintrana var. zaiana
benefits: Ononis cintrana var. zaiana has many benefits, such as its ability to help manage diabetes by reducing blood sugar levels, as well as its antioxidant properties that can protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. This plant has also been shown to exhibit antimicrobial properties, which can aid in wound healing and prevent infections, making it a valuable resource for treating various health issues. Moreover, Ononis cintrana var. zaiana has been found to have anti-inflammatory and anti-cancer properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis, reduce the risk of certain types of cancer, and promote overall well-being. By utilizing the benefits of this plant, individuals can lead healthier, more active lives, with improved physical and mental health, and a reduced risk of chronic diseases.

parts: Ononis cintrana var. zaiana has many medicinal parts, such as the roots, leaves, and flowers, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The roots of the Ononis cintrana var. zaiana plant contain alkaloids, including ononin, which are known for their diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties. The leaves of the plant contain flavonoids, such as quercetin, which have been found to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The flowers of the plant contain glycosides, including ononin glycosides, which have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues and as a diuretic.
side_effects: Ononis cintrana var. zaiana can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal problems, allergic reactions, and interactions with other medications. Excessive consumption of the plant's extracts may lead to nausea, diarrhea, and vomiting. In severe cases, improper use of Ononis cintrana var. zaiana can also cause kidney or liver damage.
